suite.name: EX01 Login Resources

kw.name: Open the browser and go to OrangeHRM
Create Webdriver
kw.msg: Creating an instance of the Edge WebDriver.
kw.doc: Creates an instance of Selenium WebDriver.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Set Selenium Speed
kw.doc: Sets the delay that is waited after each Selenium command.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: wait until element is visible in the page
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: verify the login page title or logo is visible
Get Title
kw.doc: Returns the title of the current page.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.name: Verification of Login with Valid credentials

kw.name: Open the browser and go to OrangeHRM
Create Webdriver
kw.msg: Creating an instance of the Edge WebDriver.
kw.doc: Creates an instance of Selenium WebDriver.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Set Selenium Speed
kw.doc: Sets the delay that is waited after each Selenium command.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: wait until element is visible in the page
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: wait until element is visible in the page
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: verify if dashboard page is visible
Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

suite.name: EX02 Login DataDriver

test.name: Login with the Admin1 and admin123

kw.name: Open the browser and go to OrangeHRM
Create Webdriver
kw.msg: Creating an instance of the Edge WebDriver.
kw.doc: Creates an instance of Selenium WebDriver.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Set Selenium Speed
kw.doc: Sets the delay that is waited after each Selenium command.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: wait until element is visible in the page
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: wait until element is visible in the page
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: verify the 'Required' field validation messages appear
Element Text Should Be
kw.msg: Verifying element 'xpath://p[contains(., 'Invalid credentials')]' contains exact text 'Invalid credentials'.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

suite.name: EX03 Dashboard

kw.name: Open the OrangeHRM application and login with valid credentials
Create Webdriver
kw.msg: Creating an instance of the Edge WebDriver.
kw.doc: Creates an instance of Selenium WebDriver.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Set Selenium Speed
kw.doc: Sets the delay that is waited after each Selenium command.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: wait until element is visible in the page
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: verify dashboard is displayed in the page
Element Text Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.

kw.name: verify the navigation menu items are visible
Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Element Text Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.

kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.

kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Element Text Should Be
kw.msg: Verifying element 'xpath://a//span[contains(., 'My Info')]' contains exact text 'My Info'.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Get Location
kw.doc: Returns the current browser window URL.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: click on the profile dropdown at the top right
Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: verify if the logout button appears
Element Text Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

suite.doc: This is the test case file

suite.name: EX04 Admin UserManagement

test.name: Add and Verify a System User

kw.name: Open the OrangeHRM application and login with valid credentials
Create Webdriver
kw.msg: Creating an instance of the Edge WebDriver.
kw.doc: Creates an instance of Selenium WebDriver.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Set Selenium Speed
kw.doc: Sets the delay that is waited after each Selenium command.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.msg: Verifying element 'xpath://h6[contains(.,'Add')]' contains exact text 'Add User'.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.

kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Element Text Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.

kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: fill username, password, confirm password and click save
Get WebElements
kw.doc: Returns a list of WebElement objects matching the ``locator``.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'kane williamson' into text field 'xpath://label[text()='Username']/ancestor::div[contains(@class,'oxd-input-group')]//input[contains(@class,'oxd-input')]'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: verify the new user appears in the table
Element Should Be Visible
kw.msg: Element with locator 'xpath://div[text()='kane williamson']' not found.
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.
kw.status: Element with locator 'xpath://div[text()='kane williamson']' not found.
Element with locator 'xpath://div[text()='kane williamson']' not found.

kw.name: search for the user you just created using the Search Username field and verify exactly 1 result appears
Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.status: Element with locator 'xpath://div[text()='kane williamson']' not found.

kw.name: Open the OrangeHRM application and login with valid credentials
Create Webdriver

wait until element is visible in the page

kw.name: Create List
kw.msg: @{expectedlist} = [ Username | User Role | Employee Name | Status | Actions ]
kw.doc: Returns a list containing given items.

kw.name: Create List
kw.doc: Returns a list containing given items.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Append To List
kw.doc: Adds ``values`` to the end of ``list``.

kw.doc: Adds ``values`` to the end of ``list``.

kw.name: Lists Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if given lists are unequal.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Get WebElements
kw.doc: Returns a list of WebElement objects matching the ``locator``.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

Get WebElements
kw.doc: Returns a list of WebElement objects matching the ``locator``.

kw.doc: Returns a list containing given items.

suite.doc: This is the Test Case File

suite.name: EX06 Admin JobTitle

test.name: Verification of Adding and Verifying required fields

kw.name: Open the OrangeHRM application and login with valid credentials
Create Webdriver
kw.msg: Creating an instance of the Edge WebDriver.
kw.doc: Creates an instance of Selenium WebDriver.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Set Selenium Speed
kw.doc: Sets the delay that is waited after each Selenium command.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: wait until element is visible in the page
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: select the value from the dropdown
Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element

kw.name: verify the job titles page and the count of jobs
wait until element is visible in the page
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Text Should Be
kw.msg: Verifying element 'css:h6.orangehrm-main-title' contains exact text 'Job Titles'.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Get WebElements
kw.doc: Returns a list of WebElement objects matching the ``locator``.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: click add and verify the add job title form opens
Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Text Should Be
kw.msg: Verifying element 'css:h6.orangehrm-main-title' contains exact text 'Add Job Title'.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.

kw.name: click save without filling the job title and verify the validation
Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Element Text Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.

kw.name: fill the job title field and verify the title appears in the list
Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'Associate director' into text field 'xpath://label[normalize-space()='Job Title']/ancestor::div[contains(@class,'oxd-input-group')]//input'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: wait until element is visible in the page
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Get WebElements
kw.doc: Returns a list of WebElement objects matching the ``locator``.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: locate the element on this page
Split String
kw.doc: Splits the ``string`` using ``separator`` as a delimiter string.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

suite.doc: This is the test case file
